system.title: Escape_Platform
system.subtitle: An interactive learning environment for CS competencies under the Czech RVP standards.

level1.title: Memory Defragmentation
level1.subtitle: Manual Bubble Sort Protocol
level1.hint: Compare the two highlighted memory blocks. If the LEFT value is GREATER than the RIGHT value, press SWAP. Otherwise, press KEEP.
level1.mistakeSwap: {{a}} < {{b}} — they are already in order. Press KEEP.
level1.mistakeKeep: {{a}} > {{b}} — they are out of order! Press SWAP.
level1.awaitingSort: MEMORY BLOCKS CORRUPTED. AWAITING MANUAL DEFRAGMENTATION...
level1.sortComplete: DEFRAGMENTATION COMPLETE. MEMORY ALIGNED. DOOR UNLOCKED.
level1.tokenGranted: ACCESS TOKEN GRANTED. PROCEEDING TO NEXT ZONE...

level2.title: PATROL ROUTE OVERRIDE
level2.subtitle: Loop Runner Protocol
level2.awaitingProgram: SECURITY BOT OFFLINE. PROGRAM A PATROL LOOP TO REACH THE EXIT...
level2.doorUnlocked: ROUTE COMPLETE. BLAST DOOR OVERRIDE ACCEPTED.
level2.hint: Build a repeating pattern of commands (loop body). The robot executes all commands in order, then repeats. Set the number of repetitions and press RUN. Watch the robot — if it hits a wall or misses the exit, adjust your commands or iteration count.
level2.emptyBody: Add commands to the loop body...
level2.hitWall: Robot crashed into a wall! Adjust your commands.
level2.missedExit: Robot didn't reach the exit. Try changing the iteration count or commands.
level2.success: Route complete! The robot reached the exit.

lore.sys:
SYSTEM CONFIGURATION [RESTRICTED]

Memory allocation module bypassed.
Next zone requires a patrol bot to navigate a corridor grid.
The bot can only MOVE FORWARD, TURN LEFT, or TURN RIGHT.
Find a repeating pattern and use a loop.
lore.warn:
INCIDENT REPORT #04

The security bot has been deactivated. To reopen the blast door, someone must program a new patrol route.

The corridors form a zigzag pattern — the bot needs to navigate around walls.
HINT: Look for a short sequence of moves that repeats to cover the whole path.
lore.readme:
WELCOME TO THE STAFF PORTAL.

Reminder: The blast door override requires a correctly looping patrol route. A loop is a sequence of commands that repeats multiple times. Think about which commands move the bot through one section of the corridor, then how many times that pattern must repeat.

room.mysteriousNote:
Where am I? The last thing I remember... the facility AI went rogue and scrambled all the memory blocks. The mainframe's data bus is damaged — it can only compare two ADJACENT blocks at a time.

If you're reading this, we need to manually sort the memory to restore the system. The shift supervisor's log should explain the defragmentation procedure.
room.employeeLog:
SHIFT SUPERVISOR LOG

Emergency Defragmentation Protocol:
1. Look at two neighboring memory blocks
2. If the left one has a BIGGER value than the right one, SWAP them
3. If they are already in order, leave them and move on
4. Keep going until everything is sorted

This is called 'Bubble Sort' — the biggest values slowly bubble to the end, like air bubbles rising in water.
